title: Domain Schema: governance/decision Record (v1)
description: Validates a Tier 2 Record whose typeId is 1fcad6a2-9f78-5e41-94ba-d82e88b822f3 (governance/decision v1). Composes the structural record.json schema with type-specific field constraints. Records pointing here as their $schema will pass both structural and domain validation.

FieldIds.description: Field UUID reference table for governance/decision records. Order matches the canonical deliberation sequence (0–11).

73cd845a-3623-5bc6-8ade-42a7cd64740c.description: order:1  governance/decision_question — displayLabel: 'Decision question'. Optional. String.

636ce948-2110-57b4-a3ed-04354ec17843.description: order:4  governance/alternatives_considered — displayLabel: 'Not chosen'. Optional. Text/plain.

a952604c-d150-5315-bfc1-7229ddc1d636.description: order:5  governance/key_requirements — displayLabel: 'Key requirements'. Optional. Text/plain.

c04b7f84-9a55-5353-8c9f-2b62f6a1e34e.description: order:8  governance/revisit_when — displayLabel: 'Revisit when'. Optional. Text/plain.

4181f210-f4be-5587-950e-890eda2a5590.description: order:9  governance/next_steps — displayLabel: 'Next steps'. Optional. Text/plain.

aee7afe9-6650-5fa4-a61a-495c3b88994b.description: order:11 governance/status — displayLabel: 'Status'. Required. Select: draft | proposed | active | deferred | superseded | closed | rejected | archived.
